votes.rationale: Makes the OpenAI-only slot baseline visible in the Panel Viewer by resolving candidate/selector slots to provider/model/notes. Improves operator trust and debuggability without changing scoring or adding execution.
Low-risk UI/loader enhancement. Reads the existing model-slots manifest and presents it; no secrets stored there and no workflow behavior changes.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. This completes the visibility loop after slot binding and bulk instantiation.
